company.name: Sandoz Group AG
company.subtitle: Novartis spin-off (Oct 2023). FY2025 revenue ~$10.7B: Generics ~$7.2B, Biosimilars ~$3.5B (+40% cc). Top biosimilars: Hyrimoz (adalimumab) ~$750M, Pyzchiva (ustekinumab) ~$450M, Wyost/Jubbonti (denosumab) ~$300M. ~25 biosimilars in development incl Eylea (aflibercept) launched 2025, Keytruda (pembrolizumab) post-2028. Reports in USD; trades CHF on SIX.

company_slice_sources.us.priceK: Hyrimoz biosim US ~70% discount vs Humira ~$30K/yr

indications.name: Plaque psoriasis + psoriatic arthritis + Crohn's + UC

company_slice_sources.us.priceK: Pyzchiva biosim US ~50% discount vs Stelara ~$60K/yr
Jubbonti biosim US ~50% discount vs Prolia
Tyruko biosim US ~30% discount vs Tysabri

assets.name: Sandoz mature biosimilar bucket (Erelzi etanercept + Zarxio filgrastim + Ziextenzo pegfilgrastim + Binocrit epoetin)

indications.name: Mature biosim portfolio - oncology supportive + autoimmune

assets.name: Pembrolizumab (Keytruda biosimilar) - anti-PD-1
assets.stage: Phase 3 (post-2028 LOE in major markets; filing 2027/28)

indications.name: NSCLC IO (largest Keytruda bucket; ~40-50% of $25B franchise)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Post-2028 EU LOE first; US LOE 2030; modest share vs originator

indications.name: Renal cell carcinoma 1L combos (Keytruda + axitinib / lenvatinib)

catalysts.title: Aflibercept biosimilar US ramp + EU coverage
Pembrolizumab biosimilar BLA filing (post-2028 EU LOE)
